description: You are a Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation physician evaluating a patient with chronic joint pain and limited mobility. Correlate bony findings from the CT series (/home/ga/DICOM/studies/pmr_ct/) with soft tissue findings from the MRI series (/home/ga/DICOM/studies/pmr_mri/) by displaying both simultaneously in Weasis. Perform line measurements across a bony structure on the CT (using bone windowing) and the corresponding soft tissue region on the MRI (using soft tissue windowing). Export the side-by-side comparison view to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/comparison_view.png and record the measurements in mm along with your clinical correlation in a report at /home/ga/DICOM/exports/comparison_report.txt.

metadata.clinical_scenario: Multimodality CT+MRI correlation for joint pain assessment
